basics.name: ismail alsaedi
basics.label: Principal AI Engineer
basics.summary: A seasoned Principal AI Engineer with over a decade of experience in designing, building, and deploying large-scale machine learning systems. Expert in turning complex business problems into high-performance, data-driven solutions. Passionate about leveraging AI to create impactful products and mentoring the next generation of engineers.

work.name: Innovate AI Corp
work.summary: Lead the core AI research and development team. Responsible for the architecture of the company's main recommendation engine, which serves millions of users daily. Mentored a team of 8 engineers.

work.name: DataDriven Solutions
work.summary: Developed and deployed NLP models for sentiment analysis and entity recognition products. Optimized model performance, reducing inference time by 40%. Contributed to several open-source projects.

work.name: TechStart Inc.
work.summary: Worked on the backend services for a high-traffic e-commerce platform. Built data pipelines for analytics and reporting.

education.area: Computer Science, specialization in Artificial Intelligence

projects.name: Project Hermes
projects.summary: An open-source framework for building and evaluating Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines. Gained 5k+ stars on GitHub.

projects.name: Semantic CV
projects.summary: This website. A fully semantic, machine-readable CV designed to be optimally parsed by ATS, AI crawlers, and knowledge graph systems.
